basic_details.job_title: NITTTR Kolkata Consultant-cum-Training & Placement Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technical Teachers' Training and Research, Kolkata
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technical Teachers' Training and Research, Kolkata (NITTTR Kolkata) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Consultant-cum-Training & Placement Officer Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree (MBA or M. Tech desirable), Minimum 5 years of work experience in the relevant field
qualification.details: Consultant-cum-Training & Placement Officer: Post Graduate Degree (MBA or M. Tech desirable). Minimum 5 years of work experience in the relevant field.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NITTTR Kolkata Consultant-cum-Training & Placement Officer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NITTTR Kolkata to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NITTTR Kolkata Consultant-cum-Training & Placement Officer Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NITTTR Kolkata Consultant-cum-Training & Placement Officer Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NITTTR Kolkata to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NITTTR Kolkata Consultant-cum-Training & Placement Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NITTTR Kolkata Consultant-cum-Training & Placement Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit online applications is 31st July 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant-cum-Training & Placement Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Consultant-cum-Training & Placement Officer post in NITTTR Kolkata.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a Post Graduate Degree, with an MBA or M. Tech being desirable. A minimum of 5 years of work experience in the relevant field is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Consultant-cum-Training & Placement Officer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this post is 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Consultant-cum-Training & Placement Officer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 40,000 to Rs. 50,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for NITTTR Kolkata recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will include a Written Test, a Skill Test, and an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at NITTTR Kolkata.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The link to download the official notification PDF is provided in the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the Consultant-cum-Training & Placement Officer post?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official website of NITTTR Kolkata or via the direct application link provided in the Important Links section.
